elements.slugline: INT. STUDIO ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM SEAMLESS ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” DUSK KEY
elements.location: STUDIO ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM SEAMLESS ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” DUSK KEY

elements.text: Black. A single warm key fades up. The silhouette of a tilt-head stand mixer emerges ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” empire red, polished chrome, motionless. The camera holds.

elements.slugline: INT. STUDIO ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM SEAMLESS ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CONTINUOUS
elements.location: STUDIO ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM SEAMLESS ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CONTINUOUS

elements.text: The mixer slowly comes alive. The dough hook descends. White flour catches the light as it drifts down through the warm key. The whole frame breathes ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” slow push-in, locked register, no cuts inside the shot.

elements.slugline: INT. STUDIO ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM SEAMLESS ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” RESULT
elements.location: STUDIO ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM SEAMLESS ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” RESULT

elements.text: A single perfect loaf sits where the mixer was. Same key, same seamless, same scale. A hand enters frame, places a folded linen beside it. Holds.

elements.slugline: INT. CARD ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM ON BLACK ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” END
elements.location: CARD ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” CREAM ON BLACK ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” END

elements.text: WHIRLPOOL wordmark fades up. Underneath, smaller: KitchenAid ГѓВ‚Г‚В· Since 1919. Under that, smaller still: Every day, care.
